# Draft status update message

> **Draft — review recipients and content before sharing. WorkerBee did not send this message.**

- **To:** steering-committee@example.com
- **Subject:** Atlas migration status — week ending July 21, 2026

Hello,

Atlas remains **at risk** this week. The data migration is complete, but security sign-off is still outstanding and may affect the July 31 launch decision.

Progress this period:

- Completed the production migration rehearsal.
- Closed 18 of 20 readiness actions.

Attention needed:

- Security owner to confirm the exception path by July 23.
- Steering committee to decide whether to retain the July 31 date.

Next period, the team will close the final readiness actions and publish the go-live recommendation.

Thank you,
Atlas delivery team
